PART2 says 14-16 weeks. CLAUDE.md says 8-12 weeks. Significant discrepancy. PART2 may have expanded scope. PLAN 3.0 should be authoritative but not yet verified.

findings.description: V1 implementation period: PART2 says 14-16 weeks but CLAUDE.md says 8-12 weeks. ~50% longer than SOT estimate.
findings.evidence: PART2 L1589: '14-16주 (6개 Phase)'. CLAUDE.md L18: 'V1(₩40K/월 MVP, 8~12주)'. Either scope expanded or CLAUDE.md is outdated.

findings.description: V2 Guardrails layer count: PART2 V2-Phase 3 table (L675) and V2 checklist (L687) still say 4-Layer for V2, contradicting PART2's own config (L1339: V2=3-Layer) and CLAUDE.md §11.
findings.evidence: v8 Agent 2 B2-1/B2-2. Internal PART2 inconsistency across sections. V2-Phase 3 table not updated after v10.0.0 correction.

findings.description: S7E-011 Instruction Hierarchy (5-level prompt priority L0~L4) — CRITICAL V1 security requirement not in PART2. Essential for prompt injection defense.
findings.evidence: D2.0-07 S7E-011: L0(Core Constitution) > L1(System Prompt) > L2(User) > L3(Tool/Doc) > L4(History). Phase 2 F-05.

findings.description: RAG operation limits (15 documents / 30 chunks max) from D2.0-06 §1.1 not in PART2 V1-Phase 2.
findings.evidence: D2.0-06 §1.1: '운영 한계: 문서 15개 / 청크 30개'. Phase 2 F-A6-01.

findings.description: V2 Lead Agent model (Opus) not stated in PART2 V2 section.
Agent lifecycle states (created→initialized→active→suspended→terminated→archived) not described in PART2.
88 API endpoint count not explicitly stated in PART2 body, though SOT consistently references this number.
findings.evidence: CLAUDE.md L59, MASTER_SPEC §13: '88 엔드포인트'. PART2 references PHASE_B1 but doesn't cite the endpoint count.

findings.description: PART2 V1 security items (§6.5) and READINESS_REVIEW §9 S7E items have mismatched classification systems — only 5/15 directly mappable.
findings.evidence: v8 Agent 2 B8. PART2 uses implementation-area classification, READINESS uses S7E-ID classification.

resolved: v8 B5 (Non-goal 7 items not enumerated in PART2) — still MEDIUM but CLAUDE.md §8 has full list, acceptable reference chain
